The '''brith''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of large, flying creatures that were indigenous to the [[Grass/Legends|grassy]] [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. Their fin-like wings gave them the appearance of swimming through the air. The brith were similar in both appearance and behavior<ref name="KOTOR" /> to the [[Manta (Felucia)/Legends|Felucian flying manta]]<ref name="Star Wars: The Force Unleashed">''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]''</ref> and, to a lesser extent, the [[Thranta/Legends|thrantas]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]].<ref name="ISWU">''[[The Illustrated Star Wars Universe]]''</ref>

==Biology and appearance==
Brith were characterized by their large pectoral fins and the twin lobes that projected anteriorly on either side of their broad head. They had smooth skin, a broad, rectangular terminal [[Mouth/Legends|mouth]] located at the front of the head, and a thin tail. Their two [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] were located laterally, while their gills were located ventrally. Their [[Color/Legends|coloration]] was green on the dorsal side with purple margins, and mostly white on the ventral side.<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Although the player cannot directly interact with them, brith can be seen flying above the plains of Dantooine in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''. Although the name "brith" is never said in the game itself, it does, however, appear in the game files.<ref name="KOTOR" />
